meta.name: Magneta — OFT setup batch v2 (polygon, factories only)
meta.description: Sprint 9.5 reduced batch: accept ownership of the two OFT factories. The original 3-tx batch is replaced by this 2-tx version because Gateway.setModule(13, ...) reverts on Polygon — the deployed Gateway predates Sprint 2 (OpType enum capped at 12). CREATE_TOKEN cross-chain dispatch ships separately via Sprint 9.6 CreateTokenDispatcher (LZ V2 OApp), no Gateway wiring needed.
